title: Nine Lives - An Extension to Blahaj Reforged
description: A mod that ranges from Blahaj plushies that you can cuddle, to boy kisser NPCs, lots of placable decorations and items.
body:
this is a poorly made mod, go download the mods I stole most of the models from instead:
Blåhaj - Reforged on modrinth 
And
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blahaj


All you're getting in this mod vs the other 2 is some recolors, placeable blahaj, placeable whale, my terrible 3d model of my cat as a plushie, and a creeper plushie, all of the before mentioned things will be cuddled by your playermodel while you're holding them, also this has 1.19.4 forge support unlike blahaj reforged, also includes some dumb art, some good art, a bunch of bugs, and a buttload of boy kisser meme references including 2 new boykisser NPCs(now less cursed).


Also you need GeckoLib, thank you geckolib you're amazing.
